messages.content: 帮我写个email，给phd candidate Yao Zhang (女)发邮件，询问她什么时候开源**WebArbiter: A Generative Reasoning Process Reward Model for Web Agents 这篇paper的代码**

主题：咨询《WebArbiter》代码开源时间

Yao Zhang 你好，  

我最近在阅读你们的论文 **WebArbiter: A Generative Reasoning Process Reward Model for Web Agents**，对文中方法很感兴趣，想在自己的研究/实验中复现并进一步对比。  

想请问一下你们计划在什么时候开源该论文的代码（以及训练/评测脚本等）？如果已经有对应的仓库链接，也麻烦你方便时分享一下。  

非常感谢！  
祝好，  
[你的名字]  
[你的单位/学校]  
[你的联系方式]

Subject: Question About Code Release for “WebArbiter”

Dear Yao Zhang,  

I hope this email finds you well. I recently read your paper, **“WebArbiter: A Generative Reasoning Process Reward Model for Web Agents,”** and found it very interesting. I’m hoping to reproduce the results and explore the method further in my own experiments.  

May I ask if you have an estimated timeline for open-sourcing the code (and any training/evaluation scripts)? If the repository is already available, I would greatly appreciate it if you could share the link.  

Thank you very much for your time.  

Best regards,  
[Your Name]  
[Your Affiliation]  
[Your Contact Information]
